title: Add Schoolhouse Sneak Peek, new food booths (2027/2028), Laser Hell scare zone, and chainsaw homepage background

requirements.text: Add an AI-generated chainsaw-themed background to the homepage (site-wide background layer), keeping the existing horror aesthetic and ensuring text contrast/readability remains strong across all sections.
acceptanceCriteria: A new chainsaw-themed background image is added as a static asset under frontend/public/assets/generated and is used in the homepage/global background layer.
Foreground content (hero text, cards, navigation) remains readable; background is subtly blended (e.g., via opacity/overlay) rather than overpowering.
No changes are made to any files under frontend/src/components/ui or other immutablePaths.

requirements.text: Create a new homepage section for a “Schoolhouse Haunted House” sneak peek that presents an AI-generated concept scenic elevation image of the house plus an AI-written description, and place it on the homepage.

quotes: Add a sneak peek into Schoolhouse haunted house make it a concept scenic elevation of the house
Appear at homepage, AI generated image and add own dedicated pages
Create a description for each of them

acceptanceCriteria: Homepage includes a clearly titled Schoolhouse sneak-peek section with an AI-generated concept scenic elevation image and an English description.
Section is reachable via an on-page anchor id and fits the existing styling patterns (uses the shared Section + Card layout where appropriate).

requirements.text: Add a dedicated page for the Schoolhouse Haunted House sneak peek, including the same (or expanded) scenic elevation image and description, and ensure users can navigate to it from the homepage section.

quotes: Appear at homepage, AI generated image and add own dedicated pages

acceptanceCriteria: There is a dedicated Schoolhouse sneak-peek page with a stable URL/route within the frontend.
Homepage Schoolhouse sneak-peek section includes a working link/button to open the dedicated page.
The dedicated page renders correctly on refresh (direct navigation to the URL works).

requirements.text: Add a new food booth named “Slider Doom” labeled as “Coming 2027” with menu item text exactly “Fries. Loaded sparks”, and generate an English booth description (and tagline if needed) consistent with the site’s horror tone. Show it in the homepage Food Booths section and provide a dedicated page for it.

quotes: a new food booth coming 2027 called Slider Doom menu is Fries. Loaded sparks add description for it
Appear at homepage, AI generated image and add own dedicated pages
Create a description for each of them

acceptanceCriteria: Food booth “Slider Doom” appears in the Food Booths grid on the homepage with label “Coming 2027”, an English description, and menu containing the exact text “Fries. Loaded sparks”.
A new AI-generated image is available for Slider Doom and is wired through the generatedImages mapping so the booth card displays an image.
A dedicated Slider Doom page exists with the booth’s name, label/year, image, description, and menu, and the booth card (or a CTA) links to that page.

requirements.text: Add a new food booth named “Sharks Hell” labeled as “Coming 2028” that serves the following menu items exactly: “Cookie dough sharks cookie”, “stuffed ice cream”, “chocolate white chocolate”, and “Laser beam Shake”. Generate an English booth description (and tagline if needed) consistent with the site’s horror tone. Show it in the homepage Food Booths section and provide a dedicated page for it.

quotes: a new food booth coming 2028 called Sharks Hell serves Cookie dough sharks cookie, stuffed ice cream, chocolate white chocolate to and Laser beam Shake.
Appear at homepage, AI generated image and add own dedicated pages
Create a description for each of them

acceptanceCriteria: Food booth “Sharks Hell” appears in the Food Booths grid on the homepage with label “Coming 2028”, an English description, and the menu items listed exactly as provided.
A new AI-generated image is available for Sharks Hell and is wired through the generatedImages mapping so the booth card displays an image.
A dedicated Sharks Hell page exists with the booth’s name, label/year, image, description, and menu, and the booth card (or a CTA) links to that page.

requirements.text: Add a new scare zone named “Laser Hell” with an AI-written English description and an AI-chosen specific location (expressed in English) and show it on the homepage Scare Zones section with an AI-generated image; also create a dedicated page for it that includes the description and location.

quotes: New scare zone called Laser hell add description for jt and location
Appear at homepage, AI generated image and add own dedicated pages
Create a description for each of them

acceptanceCriteria: “Laser Hell” appears in the homepage Scare Zones grid with an English tagline/description and an AI-generated image wired via the generatedImages mapping.
The location for Laser Hell is clearly displayed (either as a dedicated field rendered in UI or included as a clearly labeled line in the content).
A dedicated Laser Hell page exists and includes the zone name, image, description, and location, with a working navigation link from the homepage zone card (or CTA).

requirements.text: Update the site navigation (header) and internal linking so users can discover and reach the new dedicated pages for: Schoolhouse sneak peek, Slider Doom, Sharks Hell, and Laser Hell, without breaking existing smooth-scroll anchor navigation.

quotes: Appear at homepage, AI generated image and add own dedicated pages

acceptanceCriteria: Header navigation continues to work for existing homepage anchors (e.g., #auditions, #food-booths, #scare-zones).
Users can reach each new dedicated page from the homepage (via section CTAs/cards) and optionally via header navigation without confusing anchor-only behavior.
No console errors related to routing/navigation in normal browsing.

constraints: Use English for all user-facing text.
Do not edit any files under frontend/src/components/ui (read-only UI components) or any other paths listed in frontend.immutablePaths.
Keep backend as-is unless strictly necessary; no external databases or third-party services.
nonGoals: Do not add third-party authentication beyond Internet Identity.
Do not add payments, maps/geolocation, or external CMS integrations.

required: Chainsaw-themed horror background image with gritty texture and subtle depth (chainsaw-home-bg.dim_2400x1350.jpg)
Concept scenic elevation of a haunted schoolhouse exterior, cinematic lighting, architectural elevation feel (schoolhouse-sneak-peek-elevation.dim_1600x900.jpg)
Horror food booth key art for “Slider Doom” (booth-slider-doom.dim_1400x900.jpg)
Horror food booth key art for “Sharks Hell” (booth-sharks-hell.dim_1400x900.jpg)
Scare zone key art for “Laser Hell” with laser-like lighting atmosphere (zone-laser-hell.dim_1400x900.jpg)
